calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amended Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Oct-23-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Kenneth Fukuda, Esq. for plaintiff John Kai Chong Chan also present, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Kai CHong Chan.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-26-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Brenda Fields
There being no appearances, this matter is ordered off calendar.
